description_long: This is a robust hammer featuring a dark, metallic head with a pronounced, pointed peen on one side and a flat, circular striking face on the other. The head appears to be forged from steel, exhibiting a slightly weathered, matte finish with subtle textural details. The handle is straight and constructed from wood, reinforced with metal bands and capped at the base with a black, rubberized grip for enhanced control. The overall design suggests durability and ergonomic handling, suitable for heavy-duty tasks in urban environments such as construction or repair. The hammer's proportions are balanced, with the head being slightly larger in diameter than the handle, and the peen extending sharply for specialized use. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, emphasizing its utilitarian function.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a steel head featuring a pointed peen and a flat striking face, mounted on a straight wooden handle with a black rubberized grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pointed peen and flat striking face, with the full length of the wooden handle and rubberized grip visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular striking face and the symmetrical alignment of the handle and head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the peen and striking face, mirroring view 0 but from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the pointed peen, with the handle and grip aligned directly behind the head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a black rubberized ergonomic grip and metal reinforcement bands.
attribute_head_type: Cross-peen hammer head with a flat, circular striking face on one side and a sharply pointed peen on the other, both made of steel.
